title: GenomeLens 全局核型图
description: 对应 ``jcvi.graphics_karyotype_global`` 子模块：基于 tracks 与 edges 聚合全局核型总图。
description_en: Matches the ``jcvi.graphics_karyotype_global`` submodule: aggregate a global karyotype figure from tracks and edges.

params.label: Tracks
params.description: 轨道列表 JSON 字符串（每个 track 包含 name 与 bed 路径）。
params.description_en: Track list as a JSON string (each track has name and bed path).

params.label: Edges
params.description: 共线性边列表 JSON 字符串（每个 edge 包含 i/j/simple 路径）。
params.description_en: Synteny edge list as a JSON string (each edge has i/j/simple path).
